# Yoon Nellson Kinetic Model

**Summary**: A mathematical model used to describe the kinetics of gas or solute adsorption in a porous medium.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2021-alnasser|AlNasser, 2021]] applied Yoon-Nelson kinetic model to characterize the dynamics of methylene blue adsorption at different flow rates.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The model was applied to three flow rates (0.333, 0.125, and 0.089 mL/s) with R² values of 0.807, 0.779, and 0.354 respectively. ([[2021-alnasser|AlNasser, 2021, p. 83]])
